59. `Bash` cd ... **[TEST]**

sections.heading: Recommendations
sections.content:
- **pev-architect** (PEV Architect: staleness split): handoff gap is 100% — include more context in dispatch prompt
- **pev-architect** (PEV Architect: write pitch): handoff gap is 42% — include more context in dispatch prompt
- **pev-builder** (PEV Builder: staleness split): only 0% of exploration uses cortex tools — prefer cortex_source/cortex_graph over Read/Grep to reduce context
- **pev-builder** (PEV Builder continuation: fix tests + frontend): only 0% of exploration uses cortex tools — prefer cortex_source/cortex_graph over Read/Grep to reduce context
- **pev-builder** (PEV Builder inc3: finish frontend): handoff gap is 54% — include more context in dispatch prompt
- **pev-builder** (PEV Builder inc3: finish frontend): dispatch missing context bundle — orchestrator should inline pitch + cortex_source output
- **pev-builder** (PEV Builder inc3: finish frontend): only 2% of exploration uses cortex tools — prefer cortex_source/cortex_graph over Read/Grep to reduce context
